steps.title: Reinforce the first claim
steps.content: The first sentence says Hartley's pseudonym did more than hide his authorship. The next sentence explains that larger purpose: it was a deliberate rhetorical strategy connecting his views to ancient republican ideals.

steps.title: Reject contrast and addition
steps.content: A and D signal contrast, but the second sentence develops the first. C signals a separate added point, but the sentence is really confirming and explaining the earlier claim. A reinforcing transition is needed. The answer is B.
